contribution_description: [CONTRIBUTION EVENT] - Type: Time (Minutes) - Amount: 45 - Description: Default tracking ON in warm-up + follow-up pipelines; regenerate 6 untracked drafts Pull requests (GitHub evidence): - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/go_to_market/pull/75 Details: ## What changed Two parts on the AI email-agent pipeline (`go_to_market` repo): **1. Flag default flip (PR #75).** Switched `--track-opens` and `--track-clicks` from `action="store_true"` to `argparse.BooleanOptionalAction(default=True)` on both `scripts/suggest_warmup_prospect_drafts.py` and `scripts/suggest_manager_followup_drafts.py`. Tracking is now ON by default; opt out with `--no-track-opens` / `--no-track-clicks`. Help text and behavior table documented in the PR body. **2. Regenerated 6 stale plain-text drafts.** Six pending Gmail drafts (5 follow-ups + 1 warm-up) had been generated previously without the tracking flags, so they shipped as plain-text-only with no open pixel and no HTML alternative. Workflow: - Ran `sync_email_agent_followup.py` to record yesterday's Berkeley Herbal Center redirect on the `Email Agent Follow Up` tab so the cadence guard would skip that address (otherwise the warm-up pipeline would have re-drafted it). - Deleted the 6 plain-text Gmail drafts. Both pipelines' built-in reconciler then auto-marked the matching `Email Agent Drafts` rows as `discarded`, allowing immediate re-drafting via the cadence-bypass-after-discarded-draft branch. - Live-ran both pipelines with `--use-grok` (defaults now include tracking on). Verified each new draft's HTML alternative ends with the visible Agroverse-logo block + `` keyed to a fresh UUID matching the new sheet row. The warm-up to `sunny@countrysun.com` also picked up the new packaging photos from PR #74 (3 attachments: wholesale PDF + front + back). Drafts left in inbox for human review; nothing was sent. ## Why A forgotten flag silently produced an untracked send — measurement is permanently lost for any of those plain-text drafts that get sent. Making tracking the safe default for the agent-driven pipelines stops the silent regression. This also unblocks the PR #74 cohort study (warm-up packaging photos): without tracking on every post-2026-04-27 warm-up, the open / click comparison vs the pre-cutoff cohort would be unreliable. ## Pull requests - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/go_to_market/pull/75 (merged) - Contributor(s): Garyjob - TDG Issued: 75.00 - Attached Filename: N/A - Destination Contribution File Location: N/A -------- My Digital Signature:  Request Transaction ID:  This submission was generated using https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/blob/main/DAO_CLIENT_AI_AGENT_CONTRIBUTIONS.md Verify submission here: https://dapp.truesight.me/verify_request.html
